skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A scientific submersible is collecting samples underwater. When the submersible is at a depth of 73 fathoms, what is the submersible's depth in feet? (1 fathom = 6 feet)
rationale: Since 1 fathom = 6 feet, 73 fathoms is equivalent to 73 × 6 = 438 feet.
